title: SmokeJoy Miso Pudding with Pickled Ginger
description: A meal-prep dutch dish featuring a unique blend of smoke, miso, and pickled ginger in meringue nests for a delightful plant-based dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

In a saucepan, heat the miso and coconut milk until simmering. Stir in vanilla extract, soy sauce, honey/maple syrup, and almond flour; continue stirring for about 3 minutes or until mixture thickens slightly.
Fold pickled ginger into the pudding mixture gently.
Transfer the mixture to a piping bag fitted with a star tip. Pipe meringue nests onto prepared baking sheet.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until nests are golden brown and set. Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving.
Optional: Top each nest with some of the preserved ginger mixture to serve.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
